testcase.name: test_flake8

expected 2 blank lines after class or function definition, found 1 ./demo_pkg/subscriber_python.py:37:11: W292 no newline at end of file ./setup.py:26:29: E201 whitespace after '[' ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:22:1: F401 'std_msgs.msg.String' imported but unused ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:23:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from std_msgs.msg import Float32' should be before 'from std_msgs.msg import String' ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:23:1: F401 'std_msgs.msg.Float32' imported but unused ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:25:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from demo_pkg.publisher_python import PublisherNode' should be before 'from std_msgs.msg import Float32' ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:27:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:28:1: D205 1 blank line required between summary line and description ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:28:1: D400 First line should end with a period ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:45:35: Q000 Double quotes found but single quotes preferred ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:60:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:61:1: D202 No blank lines allowed after function docstring ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:61:1: D205 1 blank line required between summary line and description ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:61:1: D400 First line should end with a period ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:78:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:79:1: D202 No blank lines allowed after function docstring ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:79:1: D205 1 blank line required between summary line and description ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:79:1: D400 First line should end with a period ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:97:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:98:1: D202 No blank lines allowed after function docstring ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:98:1: D400 First line should end with a period ./test/pytest/test_publisher.py:126:1: E305 expected 2 blank lines after class or function definition, found 1 assert 1 == 0
